curation_notes: The patch modifies only src/waitress/channel.py (1 non-test source file). The fix adds a check in the received() method, under the requests_lock, to return False if will_close or close_when_flushed is set, preventing the race condition where a pipelined request could be queued and serviced after the connection was marked for closure due to an invalid first request. Location derived directly from the patch diff.
